# CWE-842: Placement of User into Incorrect Group (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-842-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Member struct {
	ID    uint
	Email string
	Group string
}

// Safe: new accounts receive the standard members group by default.
func RegisterMember(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	member := Member{Email: email, Group: "members"}
	db.Create(&member)
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, member)
}
